name: tinyemail
description: Reads subscribers, lists, and campaigns, and writes subscriber create/upsert actions, through the tinyEmail API.

risk.read: external tinyEmail API read of subscriber, list, and campaign data
risk.write: external tinyEmail API mutation: creates or upserts a subscriber (customer) record, optionally assigning it to a named audience segment
risk.approval: reverse ETL plan approval required before writes
